description: You are a traffic engineer debugging a Python microscopic traffic simulator used for signal timing validation located at ~/PycharmProjects/micro_sim. The simulation is currently unsafe and producing invalid results: vehicles are making dangerous left turns into oncoming traffic, the traffic signal transitions directly from Green to Red without an Amber phase, and vehicles at the back of the priority queue are experiencing starvation. Debug and fix the logic errors in sim/vehicle.py, sim/signal.py, and sim/intersection.py so that all tests pass and main.py runs without reporting collisions or violations. Do not modify the test files or the main.py scenario runner.
